148 
NEW_TCHNLGY_ADD_ON_AMT 
LABEL: 
New Technology Add on Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The amount of payments made for discharges involving approved new technologies. 
SHORT NAME: NEW_TCHNLGY_ADD_ON_AMT 
LONG NAME: NEW_TCHNLGY_ADD_ON_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field was new in 2011. 
If the total covered costs of the discharge exceed the DRG payment for the case
